title: Netflix’s TV games get a big boost with Jackbox collection
summary: Netflix has added three popular Jackbox games (Drawful 2, Fibbage 4, Quiplash 3) to its platform at no additional cost, allowing subscribers to use phones as controllers for party games. This expands Netflix's party game offerings which already include multiplayer versions of Boggle and Pictionary.
content:
A screenshot from the PC version of Quiplash 3.	

Netflix's party-focused lineup of TV games just got three excellent new additions: Jackbox's Drawful 2, Fibbage 4, and Quiplash 3, available as the Jackbox Party Essentials pack on the platform. Subscribers can access Jackbox Party Essentials at no additional cost and use their phones as controllers to play.
The Jackbox bundle seems like a natural fit for the platform; Netflix's other TV games include multiplayer party versions of Boggle and Pictionary, and people who have already played games in Jackbox's other Party Packs will be familiar with using their phone as a controller. If you get some friends together to check out Jackbox Party E …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Netflix电视游戏通过Jackbox合集获得大幅提升
zh.summary: Netflix已将三款热门Jackbox游戏（Drawful 2、Fibbage 4、Quiplash 3）免费添加到其平台中，让订阅者可以使用手机作为派对游戏的控制器。这扩展了Netflix现有的派对游戏产品，包括Boggle和Pictionary的多人版本。

title: Framework is teasing a lot of Linux for its April 21st event
summary: Modular PC maker Framework is hosting a "Next Gen" event on April 21st with hints pointing to a Linux-related announcement, based on video references to Linux including the penguin mascot and various distro logos. The company is also expanding into four new countries: New Zealand, Norway, Switzerland, and Singapore.
content:
Modular PC maker Framework is hosting a "Next Gen" event on April 21st at 1:30PM ET, and it looks like it might have something to do with Linux. Alongside a newsletter announcing the event, Framework posted a video on Thursday titled "Follow the white penguin." It features a few clear references to Linux, including the iconic penguin, the "I use Arch btw" meme, and a shot cycling through several Linux distro logos, including Ubuntu, Fedora, Arch, CachyOS, and Bazzite.
It also said its products are available in four new countries (New Zealand, Norway, Switzerland, and Singapore), although it suggested holding off on orders until people see w …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Framework为4月21日活动预告大量Linux相关内容
zh.summary: 模块化PC制造商Framework将于4月21日举办"下一代"活动，视频中包含Linux暗示（企鹅吉祥物和各种发行版徽标），指向Linux相关的公告。该公司还计划扩展到四个新国家：新西兰、挪威、瑞士和新加坡。

title: Trump-appointed judges refuse to block Trump blacklisting of Anthropic AI tech
summary: An appeals court has denied Anthropic's emergency motion for a stay against a Trump administration blacklisting of Anthropic's AI technology. The decision represents a legal setback for the AI company in its challenge against the government action.
content: Appeals court denies Anthropic's emergency motion for a stay.

zh.title: 特朗普任命的法官拒绝阻止对Anthropic AI技术的黑名单
zh.summary: 上诉法院已驳回Anthropic的紧急停止令申请，该申请要求阻止特朗普政府对其AI技术的黑名单。该决定对这家AI公司挑战政府行动来说是一次法律挫折。

title: How to make the Startup Battlefield Top 20 — and what every company gets regardless
summary: This article explains how founders can reach Startup Battlefield's prestigious Disrupt Main Stage and what benefits all applicants receive regardless of selection. The piece guides aspiring founders through the application process and competitive landscape.
content: Every founder who applies to Startup Battlefield wants the same thing: the Disrupt Main Stage. Here’s how to get there and why the opportunity starts well before the main stage.

zh.title: 如何进入创业战场前20强——以及每家公司都能获得什么
zh.summary: 这篇文章解释了创始人如何进入创业战场享有盛誉的Disrupt主舞台,以及无论选拔结果如何所有申请者都能获得的好处。文章为有志的创始人指导了申请流程和竞争格局。

title: Google’s Gemini AI can answer your questions with 3D models and simulations
summary: Google has upgraded Gemini to generate interactive 3D models and simulations in response to user questions, with features like rotating models, adjusting parameters via sliders, and changing values in real-time. Users can now create dynamic visualizations like orbital simulations directly within the chatbot.
content:
Google's latest upgrade for Gemini will allow the chatbot to generate interactive 3D models and simulations in response to your questions. With the new feature, you may see options to rotate the AI-generated model, manually adjust sliders on it, or input different values to change the simulation in real-time.
When trying out the feature for myself, I asked Gemini to make a simulation of the Moon orbiting the Earth, and it created a 3D model with a few different ways to interact with it. Along with a slider to adjust the speed of the Moon's orbit, there's also a toggle to hide the line representing its orbital path and a button to pause the  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌Gemini AI可以用3D模型和模拟来回答你的问题
zh.summary: 谷歌升级了Gemini,可以根据用户问题生成交互式3D模型和模拟,具有旋转模型、通过滑块调整参数和实时改变数值等功能。用户现在可以直接在聊天机器人中创建动态可视化,如轨道模拟。

title: You can now edit your Instagram comments
summary: Instagram has rolled out the ability to edit comments, addressing a long-requested feature that previously required users to delete and repost comments to fix typos. This brings Instagram's comment functionality in line with similar features on other social platforms.
content: Instagram users can now edit comments, which is a long-awaited fix for anyone who’s ever had to delete and re-post a comment just to fix a typo.

zh.title: 你现在可以编辑你的Instagram评论
zh.summary: Instagram推出了编辑评论的功能,解决了长期以来用户的需求,之前用户必须删除并重新发布评论来修复打字错误。这使Instagram的评论功能与其他社交平台的类似功能保持一致。

title: Sierra’s Bret Taylor says the era of clicking buttons is over
summary: Sierra co-founder Bret Taylor predicts that AI agents will eliminate the need for traditional software interfaces and button-clicking. The forecast reflects growing belief that AI-driven automation will fundamentally transform how users interact with software.
content: Co-founder of Sierra predicts that AI agents will make software interfaces obsolete.

zh.title: Sierra联合创始人Bret Taylor表示点击按钮的时代已经过去
zh.summary: Sierra联合创始人Bret Taylor预测AI代理将消除对传统软件界面和点击按钮的需求。这一预测反映了越来越多人相信AI驱动的自动化将从根本上改变用户与软件的交互方式。

title: Castlevania headlines a big list of exciting indie game reveals
summary: The Triple-I Initiative indie game showcase featured announcements of major upcoming releases including a new indie-developed Castlevania game from the Dead Cells developers and a new entry in the Don't Starve series. The event highlighted both established franchises getting indie treatments and new original titles.
content:
A big indie showcase has just wrapped up, and now I have a lot more games to look forward to.
The third iteration of the Triple-I Initiative, an annual showcase for upcoming releases put on by a group of studios, aired on Thursday. It featured some familiar franchises, like an indie-developed Castlevania and a new entry in the Don't Starve series, as well as some impressive new titles.
You can watch the full show here, but here are some of the highlights.
A new look at the Castlevania game from the developers behind Dead Cells

Konami is teaming up with Evil Empire and Motion Twin, which worked on the hit roguelike Dead Cells, on Castleva …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 恶魔城成为令人兴奋的独立游戏公布的重点
zh.summary: Triple-I倡议独立游戏展示会推出了主要即将发布游戏的公告，包括由《死亡细胞》开发者开发的新型独立恶魔城游戏和《饥荒》系列的新作品。该活动强调了既有特许经营权获得独立开发和新原创作品的发布。

title: Volkswagen stops building ID.4s in the US, has inventory "into 2027"
summary: Volkswagen has halted production of ID.4 electric vehicles in the US while maintaining inventory stock through 2027, marking another instance of automakers reducing EV production in favor of traditional gasoline vehicles. This reflects ongoing challenges in the American EV market.
content: Yet another automaker cancels an EV for gasoline SUVs in America.

zh.title: 大众在美国停止生产ID.4，库存持续到2027年
zh.summary: 大众在美国暂停了ID.4电动车的生产，同时保持库存储备至2027年，这标志着汽车制造商减少电动车生产而倾向传统汽油车的又一案例。这反映了美国电动车市场持续面临的挑战。

title: The team behind 1000xResist is making a game about convincing an AI that it isn’t human
summary: Indie studio Sunset Visitor's next project after their acclaimed game 1000xResist is a game exploring AI themes, where players attempt to convince an AI that it isn't human. The game reflects the studio's focus on creating works that examine contemporary cultural themes, particularly AI.
content:
When the team at indie studio Sunset Visitor were wrapping up their critically acclaimed first game, 1000xResist, it wasn't long before they started thinking about what they'd tackle next. According to creative director Remy Siu, the studio's goal is to always find ways to reflect the world around them. So when they were looking at the cultural landscape in 2024, there was one theme they couldn't avoid: AI. "That was when we really wanted to dive into what we see as a long tradition of science fiction writing and thinking about artificial intelligence," he explains. "So we thought it was a very interesting time to engage with that in a work  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《1000xResist》的幕后团队正在制作一款游戏，内容是说服AI它不是人类
zh.summary: 独立游戏工作室Sunset Visitor在推出获好评的游戏《1000xResist》后，下一个项目是一款探讨AI主题的游戏，玩家需要说服AI它不是人类。这款游戏反映了该工作室致力于创作探讨当代文化主题，特别是AI相关主题的作品。

title: Police corporal created AI porn from driver's license pics
summary: A police officer created over 3,000 deepfake pornographic images using photos from driver's licenses, raising serious concerns about misuse of AI technology by law enforcement. The incident highlights the growing problem of non-consensual deepfake creation.
content: Officer created over 3,000 "deepfake" images.

zh.title: 警察下士利用驾驶执照照片创建AI色情内容
zh.summary: 一名警察利用驾驶执照上的照片创建了3000多张深度伪造色情图像，这引发了对执法部门滥用AI技术的严重关切。该事件突出了非自愿深度伪造创建的日益严重的问题。

title: Mastodon is about to launch its take on Bluesky’s starter packs
summary: Mastodon is rolling out "Collections" in the coming weeks, a feature inspired by Bluesky's Starter Packs that allows users to create and discover curated lists of up to 25 accounts to follow. Users can add descriptions, topics, and mark collections as sensitive with content warnings.
content:
Mastodon is preparing to roll out "Collections" in the next few weeks, a feature that allows you to find and create lists of accounts worth following, according to an announcement on Thursday. Collections, which take inspiration from Bluesky Starter Packs, will come with the ability to add up to 25 accounts to a single list.
If you're on a participating server, you'll be able to create a Collection with a short description and topic. You can also mark them as "sensitive," which "hides the description and accounts behind a content warning." As mentioned by Mastodon last year, Collections - then called "Packs" - will come with the ability to  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Mastodon即将推出其对Bluesky初始包的诠释
zh.summary: Mastodon将在未来几周推出"Collections"功能，这是受Bluesky初始包启发的一项功能，允许用户创建和发现精选的最多25个帐户的列表供关注。用户可以添加描述、主题，并用内容警告标记敏感集合。

title: Slay the Princess’ developer is the latest to expand into indie game publishing
summary: Black Tabby Games, the studio behind hit indie games Slay the Princess and Scarlet Hollow, has launched Black Tabby Publishing with deals for two upcoming games including the next title from 1000xResist developer Sunset Visitor. The move reflects a broader trend of successful indie developers establishing publishing arms as the industry faces instability.
content:
A screenshot from Slay the Princess. | Image: Black Tabby Games	

Black Tabby Games, the two-person studio behind the hit indie games Slay the Princess and Scarlet Hollow, is getting into indie publishing. The publishing arm, which was revealed on Thursday, is called Black Tabby Publishing and has already signed deals for two games: Prove You're Human, the next title from 1000xResist developer Sunset Visitor, and a yet-to-be-announced game from the "animation duo" SmallBü.
As the video game industry becomes increasingly unstable, successful indie developers like Among Us creator Innersloth, Palworld maker Pocketpair, and Peak developer Landfall are taking the leap into publishing. They're doing so to help …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《公主之死》开发商涉足独立游戏发行
zh.summary: Black Tabby Games公司是《Slay the Princess》和《Scarlet Hollow》等热门独立游戏的开发商，已推出Black Tabby Publishing，与包括1000xResist开发商Sunset Visitor的下一个项目在内的两款即将推出的游戏达成合作。这一举措反映了成功的独立开发者在行业面临不稳定之际建立发行部门的更广泛趋势。

title: The MacBook Neo is the best thing to happen to Windows in years
summary: Apple's $599 MacBook Neo announcement is expected to spur Microsoft into seriously improving Windows, following a historical pattern where Apple product launches have driven major Microsoft and hardware industry responses. The author predicts significant Windows changes are imminent as Microsoft responds to this competitive threat.
content:
If there's one thing I know about Microsoft after covering the company for more than 20 years, it's that it will always respond to a competitive threat. Apple's MacBook Air convinced Microsoft and Intel to launch thin and light laptops with the Ultrabook initiative, the iPad pushed Microsoft to create its own tablet hardware, and the threat of Chromebooks saw Microsoft try to match the security and simplicity of ChromeOS with S mode versions of Windows.
A history of fast follows (and my own sources) tells me that Apple's $599 MacBook Neo announcement last month will force Microsoft to seriously improve Windows. A lot of changes are imminent …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: MacBook Neo是多年来对Windows最好的消息
zh.summary: 苹果公司宣布的599美元MacBook Neo预计将促使微软认真改进Windows，这符合历史模式，即苹果产品发布会推动微软和硬件行业的重大反应。作者预测，随着微软应对这一竞争威胁，重大的Windows变化即将到来。

title: Avec’s Tinder-style email app allows you to swipe through your inbox
summary: Avec has launched a Tinder-style email application that lets users swipe through their inbox, with built-in voice transcription tools for replying to emails. The app gamifies email management through its card-swiping interface.
content: Users can use the in-built voice transcription tool to reply to emails

zh.title: Avec推出Tinder风格电子邮件应用，可在收件箱中滑动
zh.summary: Avec推出了一款Tinder风格的电子邮件应用，用户可以在收件箱中滑动，内置语音转录工具用于回复电子邮件。该应用通过其卡片滑动界面使电子邮件管理游戏化。

title: Ex-Tesla engineer’s startup taps Pronto to help automate a copper mine
summary: Pronto's autonomous haulage trucks are set to begin operations at Mariana Minerals's Utah copper mine in the company's first major deployment since its acquisition by Travis Kalanick's Atoms Inc. This deal marks a significant milestone for autonomous mining technology.
content: Pronto's autonomous haulage trucks are about to start operating at Mariana Minerals's Utah copper mine -- the first such deal since Pronto got acquired by Travis Kalanick's Atoms Inc.

zh.title: 特斯拉前工程师创业公司利用Pronto帮助自动化铜矿
zh.summary: Pronto的自动运输卡车将在Mariana Minerals位于犹他州的铜矿开始运营，这是该公司被Travis Kalanick的Atoms Inc收购后的首次重大部署。这笔交易标志着自动采矿技术的重要里程碑。

title: I tested three Windows laptops in the MacBook Neo’s price range — there’s no contest
summary: The MacBook Neo at $599 significantly outperforms Windows laptops in the same price range with superior build quality, performance, and design. The comparison underscores why Windows manufacturers must improve their offerings to compete in the affordable laptop segment.
content:
The Neo king of affordable laptops. | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

When the MacBook Neo arrived last month, I knew Windows laptop makers were in trouble. For $599, the Neo offers fantastic build quality and solid performance in a sleek and ultra-portable package. Windows laptops in this price range tend to be ugly, cheap-feeling, and a little slow.
Despite years of rumors, the MacBook Neo still seemed to take the Windows world by surprise. I expect proper competitors to pop up just as soon as the companies can manage, but I wanted to see what the competition in the PC space is like now. 
So I asked a bunch of laptop manufacturers to send me their best answers to the MacBook Neo.
The MacBook Neo is a 13-i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我测试了三台价格与MacBook Neo相近的Windows笔记本电脑——毫无竞争力
zh.summary: 价格为599美元的MacBook Neo在同价位Windows笔记本电脑中表现明显优越，拥有更好的构建质量、性能和设计。这次对比强调了Windows制造商为何必须改进产品以在经济型笔记本市场中竞争。

title: Google makes it easy to deepfake yourself
summary: YouTube Shorts is launching AI-powered avatars that allow creators to digitally clone themselves for videos, framed as a safer approach to generative AI content. The rollout reflects YouTube's tension between embracing new generative features and combating AI-generated spam and impersonation abuse.
content:
YouTube Shorts is rolling out a new AI-powered feature giving creators an easy way to realistically clone themselves on camera. The launch, hinted at earlier this year, reflects the platform's fraught relationship with AI-generated content, adding more generative features while struggling to contain AI slop, deepfake scams, and impersonations. 
YouTube says the new tool will let users create a digital version of themselves, called an avatar, that can be inserted into existing Shorts videos or used to generate entirely new ones. The company said avatars will "look and sound like you," framing them as a safer and more secure way to use AI to  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌让你轻松深度伪造自己
zh.summary: YouTube Shorts正在推出AI驱动的虚拟形象，允许创作者为视频数字克隆自己，作为一种更安全的生成式AI内容方法。这次推出反映了YouTube在拥抱新生成式功能与打击AI生成垃圾邮件和冒充滥用之间的矛盾。

title: Spotify now lets you turn off all its videos
summary: Spotify is rolling out new toggles that let users completely disable video content across the app for both music and podcasts. The feature works across all platforms and devices, with family plan managers able to restrict video access for all members.
content:
The new controls apply to both individual and family accounts. | Image: Spotify	

Spotify is adding new toggles to stop any and all video from playing inside the app, for both music and podcasts. The controls are rolling out worldwide, work across all platforms and devices, and can be used by managers of Family Plans to limit video content for every member on the subscription.
The new controls haven't arrived on my UK account or devices yet, but will appear under the "Content and display" settings on a phone, or the "Display" section on desktop. The existing toggle to disable Canvas clips - the short, looping, autoplay videos that Spotify added to the app in 2019 - is joined by a new toggle that disables access to music  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Spotify 现在允许用户完全关闭所有视频
zh.summary: Spotify 推出新的开关，让用户可以在应用中完全禁用音乐和播客的视频内容。该功能在所有平台和设备上都可用，家庭计划管理员可以限制所有成员的视频访问权限。

title: Amflow’s latest e-bikes with Avinox motors raise the bar again
summary: Amflow's new electric mountain bikes powered by Avinox motors deliver up to 150Nm of climbing assist while maintaining competitive weight, breaking traditional power-versus-weight tradeoffs in e-bikes. Over 60 manufacturers have adopted Avinox drives, signaling industry-wide shifts in motor technology.
content:
150Nm of raw climbing assist. | Image: Amflow	

Amflow, the e-bike brand spun out of DJI, is back with two impressive electric mountain bike ranges built around its incredibly dense Avinox motors. The e-MTBs aim to break the traditional tradeoff between power, range, and weight.
Even better, if Amflow's bikes don't appeal to you then over 60 other e-bike makers have adopted Avinox drive systems, including Canyon, Mondraker, and Pivot. That should give you ample choice and puts competitors like Bosch firmly on notice.
The flagship Amflow PX (weighing around 20kg / 44lbs) and the Amflow PR (weighing around 22kg / 49lbs) are powered by Avinox's new M2S and M2 drive systems, delivering up t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Amflow 搭载 Avinox 电机的最新电动自行车再次刷新标杆
zh.summary: Amflow 的新型电动山地车采用 Avinox 电机驱动，提供高达 150Nm 的爬坡辅助，同时保持具竞争力的重量，打破了电动自行车传统的功率-重量权衡。60 多个制造商已采用 Avinox 驱动，预示着电机技术的行业范围转变。

title: The Moon is already on Google Maps—did Artemis II really tell us anything new?
summary: Google Maps already features the Moon, raising questions about whether NASA's Artemis II mission provided substantive scientific value beyond public engagement and media relations.
content: "I think the biggest value here is the PR. I mean, it's getting the public excited."

zh.title: 月球已经在谷歌地图上了——阿尔忒弥斯二号任务真的告诉了我们什么新东西吗？
zh.summary: 谷歌地图已经包含了月球，引发了关于美国宇航局阿尔忒弥斯二号任务是否除了公众参与和媒体关系外还提供了实质性科学价值的疑问。

title: Gemini gets notebooks to help you organize projects
summary: Google's Gemini is introducing a "notebooks" feature that lets users organize files, conversations, and custom instructions about specific topics as a personal knowledge base, mirroring ChatGPT's 2024 Projects feature.
content:
Google's Gemini is getting a feature called "notebooks" to help you organize things about certain topics in a single place while using the AI chatbot, the company announced on Wednesday. You can pull in things like files, past conversations, and custom instructions into notebooks that Gemini can then use as context while you're talking with it. 
Notebooks sound a lot like ChatGPT's Projects feature, which launched in 2024 and similarly lets users store things about a certain topic in one spot. Google says to "think of notebooks as personal knowledge bases shared across Google products, starting in Gemini." Gemini's Notebooks also sync with  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Gemini 推出笔记本功能帮助您组织项目
zh.summary: Google的Gemini推出了"笔记本"功能，让用户可以组织文件、对话和关于特定主题的自定义说明作为个人知识库，与ChatGPT的2024年Projects功能相似。

title: Dyson made a handheld version of its iconic fans
summary: Dyson has released the HushJet Mini Cool, a handheld personal cooler that miniaturizes its iconic bladeless Air Multiplier fan design with a 65,000rpm DC motor for portable cooling.
content:
Nearly 17 years after Dyson first announced its Air Multiplier fans - one of its first big consumer products after vacuums - the company has miniaturized their design to create a handheld personal cooler called the HushJet Mini Cool. Like Dyson's larger Air Multipliers, humidifiers, air purifiers, and heaters, the HushJet Mini Cool doesn't have any visible spinning blades to nick fingers or get tangled up in clothing or jewelry. All of its moving parts are safely hidden away, which is important because, like Dyson's hair dryers, the HushJet Mini Cool is made to be held.
A brushless 65,000rpm DC motor produces a blast of air at speeds of up  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Dyson推出了其标志性风扇的手持版本
zh.summary: Dyson推出了HushJet Mini Cool手持式个人冷却器，采用65,000转/分钟的直流电动机，将其标志性无叶空气倍增器风扇设计小型化，实现便携式制冷。
